title: SMSociety 2026 Conference Programme - Meta Content Library Community Roundtable
snippet: Official conference program listing Fabio Giglietto as an expert panelist for the Meta Content Library Community Roundtable at the 2026 Social Media & Society Conference, discussing the future of academic research access following the decommissioning of CrowdTangle.
description: Fabio Giglietto is featured as a panelist for the 'Meta Content Library Community Roundtable' at the International Conference on Social Media & Society 2026.

title: Algoritmi e democrazia, il caso Meta secondo lo studio di UniUrb
snippet: A feature detailing how Giglietto's scientific research ('A Pretty Blunt Approach') was highlighted in a major investigative broadcast of 'Report' on Rai3. It highlights how the European Commission launched inquiries into Meta based on Giglietto's findings on the systemic suppression of democratic political speech.
description: An article discussing the political and public fallout of Professor Giglietto's research on Meta's algorithms, including its feature on Rai3's 'Report' and subsequent European Parliament inquiries.

title: Facebook premia gli estremisti: la ricerca dell'Università di Urbino - Lumsanews

title: Secondo uno studio dell'università di Urbino l'algoritmo di Facebook ora punisce la politica ufficiale e premia gli estremisti antieuropei. Pd e FdI verso una legge bipartisan sulle piattaforme
snippet: Detailed news coverage of Fabio Giglietto's study 'A Pretty Blunt Approach,' highlighting how Meta's content-suppression policy disproportionately penalized elected officials while boosting anti-European and conspiracy-related extremist channels, prompting Italian lawmakers to call for a bipartisan regulatory response.
description: An article from Open.online covering a study by Fabio Giglietto of the University of Urbino regarding the asymmetric impact of Facebook's algorithm on political content, which has prompted discussion of bipartisan platform regulation in Italy.
